purpose: Official-source registry for bounded SSIP discovery planning across startup, MSME, innovation, challenge and state pilot portals.
important_note: These entries are discovery sources only. They are not scheme records and must not be counted as catalogue schemes until discovery, classification, validation, admin review and publication accept extracted records.

discovery_batches.description: National and central-government discovery indexes for startup, MSME and scheme directories.
MeitY and MeitY Startup Hub programme discovery sources.
State pilot sources for Andhra Pradesh startup, innovation and industries support discovery.
